posts.text: Market is looking beyond headline numbers !

posts.author: rranjan
posts.text: superb results by Muthoot . Profit doubled YoY . Fy26 EPS is > 2x FY25 EPS . QoQ growth of 20% continues. Unless everyone think that gold has peaked out and we would be in recession , we can expect bumper return over next two years. I think gold will keep inching up and demand for loan would also see growth because of increase in domestic economic activities bseindia.com 4ac13121-6bc5-4cb7-93f1-5d5de87c67f6.pdf
